name_cn:
💰Black·
24ss New Shopping Bag
A unique fusion of art and personality. Y always has a keen eye, deeply winning the hearts of fashion elites. The Y-shaped cowhide design is eye-catching, giving a casual, lazy, yet full-of-personality vibe. Extra-large capacity, fits iPad and laptop. Retro minimalist design, great for styling, stylish and photogenic!
Style No.: 817602
Size: 38-50×33×16cm
